phases.name: fork_and_customize
steps: strip original branding, inject PRINTMAXX App Factory base config

phases.name: spawn_niche_variants
steps: create yoga-streak: rebrand copy/assets for yoga audience
create hiit-tracker: rebrand copy/assets for HIIT/cardio audience
create strength-logger: rebrand copy/assets for weightlifting audience

phases.name: deploy_and_monetize
steps: create Stripe payment links for each variant
wire Firebase backend for user persistence

phases.name: content_and_distribution
steps: queue Product Hunt launches for each variant (staggered 2 weeks apart)
generate ASO-optimized App Store copy for each variant
